content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule structure, I can identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 24 (carbon).

**Atom 24 (C) has the following neighbor atoms:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 23 | C |
| 25 | C |
| 58 | H |

**geomconf_index:** 4597

The structure shows that atom C:24 is part of an aromatic ring system and is covalently bonded to two other carbon atoms (C:23 and C:25) and one hydrogen atom (H:58), which is consistent with the typical bonding pattern of an sp²-hybridized carbon in an aromatic system.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 24, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
